calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Jeffrey D. Kirk, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BERKSHIRE ADVISORS, LLC,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant JAMES REYNOLDS,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $61,011.78
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,944.87
Attorney's Fees: $2825.00
Costs: $1,374.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $69,156.60

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2016 Continued To Nov-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Continued To Sep-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
